title: Feature Analyzer Input Contract
description: Defines all input parameters required to run feature-analyzer skill autonomously without user interaction. This schema eliminates all 7 interactive checkpoints by pre-providing answers.

source.description: Source repository — where code to analyze lives

local_path.description: Absolute path to source repository on local filesystem

github_repo.description: GitHub owner/repo identifier (optional, for MCP enrichment)

branch.description: Branch to analyze in source repo

target.description: Target repository — where implementation will happen (can be same as source for single-repo analysis)

local_path.description: Absolute path to target repository on local filesystem

branch.description: Current branch in target repo (optional, defaults to current HEAD)

analysis_mode.description: Controls which analysis mode to run (eliminates Guard Clause interaction point #2)

mode.description: A = Changes Analysis (diff base..HEAD), B = Current State Analysis (explore entire codebase)

base_branch.description: REQUIRED if mode=A. Branch to diff against. Ignored if mode=B.

focus.description: Optional focus area to boost priority of matching files

description.description: Natural-language description of what to focus on

keywords.description: Search keywords extracted from focus description

scope.description: What aspects of analysis to prioritize

ticket.description: Optional GitHub Issue/PR reference for business context

url.description: Full URL to GitHub Issue or PR

automation.description: Pre-answers to ALL interactive checkpoints. This is what makes the skill run without user interaction.

skip_confirmation.description: Must be true for autonomous mode. Skips Guard Clause confirmation (interaction point #1)

cache_strategy.description: How to handle existing analysis cache (interaction point #4). fresh = always new, reuse_if_valid = use if <7d and same SHA, refresh = incremental update, compare = diff old vs new

large_changeset_strategy.description: How to handle 50+ changed files (interaction point #5)

action.description: directory = filter by path, file_types = filter by extension, commits = first N commits, p0_only = analyze only P0 files, abort = stop analysis

filter_paths.description: If action=directory, which paths to include

filter_extensions.description: If action=file_types, which extensions to include

max_commits.description: If action=commits, how many commits to analyze

max_files.description: Maximum number of files to select regardless of strategy

timeout_strategy.description: What to do when approaching 30-minute limit (interaction point #6). partial = generate report with current findings, extend = continue 15 more min, prioritize_p0 = finish only P0 files, abort = stop

intermediate_review.description: How to handle intermediate review step (interaction point #7). skip = proceed directly to documentation, log_only = log summary but don't wait, include_in_report = add summary section to final report

github_mcp_fallback.description: What to do if GitHub MCP is unavailable. git_only = proceed with local git data, abort = stop analysis

base_dir.description: Base directory for analysis output. Defaults to <DOCS_ROOT>/analysis/

folder_name.description: Custom folder name. Defaults to <feature>-<date> for Mode A, <feature>-current-state-<date> for Mode B

languages.description: Which report languages to generate. ai = Gherkin format for AI agents
